structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Control via Supply Fan Speed
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain duct static pressure at setpoint when fan is proven ON. For small Zone Groups, provide multiple gain sets based on load indicator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fan speed modulates to maintain DSP at setpoint. Gains may vary based on load.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain DSP at setpoint when the fan is proven ON. Where the Zone Group s served by the system are small, provide multiple sets of gains that are used in the control loop as a function of a load indicator (such as supply -fan airflow rate, the area of the Zone Group s that are occupied, etc.).

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: section heading without supporting rule

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Supply Air Temperature Setpoint Reset (Occupied Mode)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In Occupied Mode, the heating SAT setpoint is reset using T&R logic between 21°C and Max_HtgSAT, with parameters from Table 5.17.2.2.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: During Occupied Mode  (Table 5.17.2.2). Setpoint  shall be reset using T&R logic (see Section 5.1.14 ) between 21°C (70°F) and Max_HtgSAT. See Section 3.1.5.1  for Max_HtgSAT.
